case_title: SCOTT SIMONS VS. LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC.

REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAR-22-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(JONATHAN CHOI)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LINDSAY KRUEGER, PARALEGAL. FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC.
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED ORIGINAL SUBPOENA NOT RETURNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY SIMONS, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO GIVE PLAINTIFF OPPORTUNITY AMEND THE CLAIM TO ADD THE RIDER WHO ALLEGE CAUSED THE ACCIDENT AND SERVE THE RIDER TO MAR-13-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SCOTT SIMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LINDSAY KRUEGER, PARALEGAL. PLAINTIFF CANNOT SHOW DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC. IS LIABLE. COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC TO PROVIDE NAME AND ADDRESS OF THE RIDER/RENTER AND A COPY OF THE AGREEMENT TO PLAINTIFF. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO GIVE PLAINTIFF OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND CLAIM TO ADD RIDER WHO ALLEGE CAUSED THE ACCIDENT AS DEFENDANT AND TO SERVE THE RIDER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM AND ADD RIDER AS DEFENDANT WHO CAUSED ACCIDENT AND SERVE THE RIDER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC {HEARING: 03/13/23 AT 8:30AM}
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JONATHAN CHOI [HEARING: 3/13/23 AT 8:30AM]
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED FEB-07-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER MAR-13-2023. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SIMONS, SCOTT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC. CHOI, JONATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-16-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SCOTT SIMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC., REPRESENTED BY LINDSAY KRUEGER (PARALEGAL) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN CHOI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS DEFENDANT JONATHAN CHOI AND CASE IS CONTINUED AS AGAINST DEFENDANT LYFT BIKES AND SCOOTERS, LLC TO TUES. MAY 16, 2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE, THEN DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE ("DWP"). IF THERE IS AN APPEARANCE, CONDUCT HEARING FOR JUDGEMENT DECISION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **THIS IS A DISMISSAL OF 2ND DEFENDANT - JONATHAN CHOI - ONLY** FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMONS, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, JONATHAN
